languages.text: Трудно сказать, сколько времени продолжался путь. Наконец, мы достигли цели — одной из многочисленных галерей, пронизывающих недра планеты. Коридор, облицованный черным металлом, был тих и совершенно пуст.

traits.locale_text: Трудно сказать, сколько времени продолжалась эта пытка. Когда внизу забрезжил слабый свет, мой измученный разум сыграл со мной злую шутку — мне показалось, что это отблески, исходящие от панцирей целого роя мерзких многоногих созданий, копошащихся под ногами. Наваждение развеялось, стоило нам спуститься в техническую галерею. Низкий коридор, облицованный черным металлом, был тих и совершенно пуст.

languages.text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.
languages.original_text: Трудно сказать, сколько времени продолжался путь. Наконец, мы достигли цели — одной из многочисленных галерей, пронизывающих недра планеты. Коридор, облицованный черным металлом, был тих и совершенно пуст.

traits.locale_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that crossed the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.
I cannot say how long our descent lasted, but at last we reached our goal — a wide utility passageway. The low corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that crossed the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

languages.text: 我无法判断我们下行了多久。终于，我们抵达了目的地：这颗行星内部纵横交错的众多通道之一。黑色金属包裹的走廊寂静无声，空无一物。
languages.original_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

traits.locale_text: 我无法判断我们下行了多久。终于，我们抵达了目的地：这颗行星内部纵横交错的众多通道之一。黑色金属包裹的走廊寂静无声，空无一物。

languages.text: No sé cuánto duró nuestro descenso. Por fin alcanzamos nuestra meta: uno de los muchos pasadizos que recorrían las entrañas del planeta. El pasillo, forrado de metal negro, estaba silencioso y completamente vacío.
languages.original_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

traits.locale_text: No sé cuánto duró nuestro descenso. Por fin alcanzamos nuestra meta: uno de los muchos pasadizos que recorrían las entrañas del planeta. El pasillo, forrado de metal negro, estaba silencioso y completamente vacío.

languages.text: Je ne saurais dire combien de temps dura notre descente, mais nous finîmes par atteindre notre but : l'un des nombreux passages qui sillonnaient les entrailles de la planète. Ce couloir aux parois recouvertes de métal noir était silencieux et entièrement vide.
languages.original_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

traits.locale_text: Je ne saurais dire combien de temps dura notre descente, mais nous finîmes par atteindre notre but : l'un des nombreux passages qui sillonnaient les entrailles de la planète. Ce couloir aux parois recouvertes de métal noir était silencieux et entièrement vide.

languages.text: İnişimizin ne kadar sürdüğünü söyleyemem. Nihayet hedefimize, gezegenin derinliklerine işleyen sayısız geçitten birine ulaştık. Siyah metalle kaplı koridor, sessiz ve tamamen boştu.
languages.original_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

traits.locale_text: İnişimizin ne kadar sürdüğünü söyleyemem. Nihayet hedefimize, gezegenin derinliklerine işleyen sayısız geçitten birine ulaştık. Siyah metalle kaplı koridor, sessiz ve tamamen boştu.

languages.text: Ich kann nicht sagen, wie lange unser Abstieg dauerte. Schließlich erreichten wir unser Ziel: einen der vielen Gänge in den Eingeweiden des Planeten. Der mit schwarzem Metall ausgekleidete Korridor war still und vollkommen leer.
languages.original_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted. Finally, we reached our goal: one of the many passageways that riddled the bowels of the planet. The corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

traits.locale_text: Ich kann nicht sagen, wie lange unser Abstieg dauerte. Schließlich erreichten wir unser Ziel: einen der vielen Gänge in den Eingeweiden des Planeten. Der mit schwarzem Metall ausgekleidete Korridor war still und vollkommen leer.

languages.text: 下降の時間はわからないが、ついに目的の場所、広いユーティリティ通路にたどり着いた。黒く塗られた低い通路は静かで、全く人がいなかった。
languages.original_text: I cannot say how long our descent lasted, but at last we reached our goal — a wide utility passageway. The low corridor, clad in black metal, was quiet and completely empty.

traits.locale_text: 下降の時間はわからないが、ついに目的の場所、広いユーティリティ通路にたどり着いた。黒く塗られた低い通路は静かで、全く人がいなかった。
